data.title: Why You Should Never Change a High-Risk LLC Name (Do This Instead)
data.summary: Why You Should Never Change a High-Risk LLC Name (Do This Instead)
data.description:
Your client has a high-risk LLC name?

Don't change it. Start over.

Here's why.

We had a client with "Investments" in the name.

Went through every step.
Updated the Secretary of State.
Did everything right.

Chase still rejected it.

And even when a bank is more flexible…
changing an LLC name means:

→ New EIN
→ Update with all business bureaus
→ Contact every bank they've ever worked with

It's a nightmare.
Not worth it.

The only exception?
If the LLC is 2+ years old.

Then the age might be worth keeping.

Otherwise?
Start fresh.

Do it right from the beginning.

Save yourself months of headaches.

Comment "LLC" and I'll show you exactly how to set one up the right way 👇

data.summary: Anthony's Testimonial for Alec Delpuech And Credit Coach Academy
data.description:
Most "gurus" won't teach you anything.
They just want 20% of your deals.

Anthony saw through it.

He joined CCA instead…

and learned the whole process himself.

Personal credit. Business credit. Funding strategy.
All of it. Done right.

The result?
$90K approved.
And he's just getting started.

The best part?
It's duplicatable.
He can now use the same system
across all of his businesses.

That's not a win.
That's a new way of operating.

Comment "CCA" and I'll show you how it works 👇

data.title: When Everything Falls Apart, Do This One Thing
data.summary: When Everything Falls Apart, Do This One Thing
data.description:
Business feels like it's falling apart?

Do this one thing.

Get as close to the money as possible.

Marketing slow? Ignore it for now.

Clients in your pipeline? Go there first.

You already have people ready to pay you
the moment you get them results.

That's money sitting right there.

Go get the wins.
Then go get more clients.

When everything feels off…
the answer is always the same.

Get close to the money. 💰

Comment "FUNDING" and I'll show you how to get your clients fast results 👇
